texto: Zen is a path of liberation. It liberates you. It is freedom from the first step to the last. You are not required to follow any rules
autor: you are required to find out your own rules and your own life in the light of awareness.
explicacao: Citação de you are required to find out your own rules and your own life in the light of awareness. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Zen is a path of liberation. It liberates you. It is freedom from the first step to the last. You…” articula reflexao, osho, dang-dang-doko-dang em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dang-dang-doko-dang.
